modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: OneDrive is almost full due to Outlook archive files.

full_description_text: I got a message my OneDrive is full. Looks like it’s from Outlook archive. Do I need this file? How to delete it? Thanks!
short_description: OneDrive is almost full due to Outlook archive files.
description: I got a message my OneDrive is full. Looks like it’s from Outlook archive. Do I need this file? How to delete it? Thanks!
